questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a How does the Internet of Things differ from traditional internet usage? 2.5 b Discuss the term “Industrial IoT” in today’s scenario. 2.5 c Describe one IoT-based smart city service and how it improves urban life. 2.5 d Why is networking important in IoT systems? Mention one example where networking enables an IoT solution. 2.5 e Define data analytics in the context of IoT. 2.5 f Briefly explain the difference between Zigbee and LoRaWAN in terms of range and power usage. 2.5 g How is Arduino different from Raspberry Pi? 2.5 h What security concerns arise in IoT systems, and what are some basic ways to address them? 2.5
Explain the architecture and components of an IoT system. How do sensing and actuation technologies contribute to the functioning of IoT applications? 10
Discuss the role of communication protocols in IoT with a focus on HTTP. How does HTTP work in IoT systems and what are its limitations? 10
What is interoperability in the context of IoT systems? Why is it a critical challenge and how can it be addressed? 10
Describe the concept of machine-to-machine communication. How does M2M communication influence the performance and scalability of IoT networks? 10
What are the steps involved in implementing an IoT system using Raspberry Pi? Provide an example use-case to illustrate your answer. 10
Define Software Defined Networking . Explain the role of SDN in IoT with emphasis on network management, flexibility, and scalability. 10
Compare cloud computing and fog computing in the context of IoT. How does fog computing address the limitations of cloud computing in real-time applications? 10
Explain how IoT is transforming the healthcare industry. Describe an IoT-based remote health monitoring system and its benefits. 10
